translation.textAccessTheVariety: Access the variety of learning available on our platform.
translation.textLetsKeep: Let’s keep track of your Individual Development Plan
translation.textOurLearningSolutionsHeading3: The Journey of People Manager in Indonesia
translation.textOurLearningSolutionsContent1: Find learning materials according to your development plan and needs on PMI Campus!
translation.textOurLearningSolutionsContent2: Find leaning materials specially curated for Indonesian Market here!
translation.textOurLearningSolutionsContent3: Let’s go through the journey on how to be a great People Manager in Indonesia!
translation.textOurLearningSolutionsContent4: Register to external course and certification, and higher education program only in SFF
translation.textCapabilityModelContent1: Core skills directly related to the company operations and business strategy.
translation.textCapabilityModelContent2: Leadership and management skills to effectively lead and inspire teams.
translation.textCapabilityModelContent3: Knowledge and technical skills required to execute specific tasks and responsibilities.
translation.textRedeemPointsContent: Earn exciting rewards by exchanging your points.
translation.textBehindTheChallengeDesc: As the business is changing rapidly, we need to do a continuous learning and adapting to the environment. At Sampoerna, we are committed to equip employees with the current skills and future skills to have a sustainable career and development. As the first step, we encourage you to join 1 Menit 1 Hari challenge for the next 21 days, which you will find and learn more about PMI Products, a more effective way to Drive for Impact, and Generative AI.
translation.textApaItuTantanganDesc: 1 Menit 1 Hari is a 21-day challenge where you will be assigned a learning task to be completed every day. 1 Menit 1 Hari Challenge is created to help you build a better learning culture. This challenge also serves as a preliminary round to Cerdas Cermat “Siapa Berani Menembus Batas!”. Participants who succeeds to reach the TOP 11 with the highest score in their group will get the chance to continue their journey in Cerdas Cermat “Siapa Berani Menembus Batas!”. Don’t miss the chance to acquire the prizes worth million rupiahs.
translation.textCaraTantanganDesc1: Go to the challenge day you want to complete. Then, read the learning material by clicking the available link.
translation.textCaraTantanganDesc2: After you finish reading the material, go back to the challenge page, and don’t forget to give tick in the box as a proof that you have completed the learning material.
translation.textCaraTantanganDesc3: Don’t forget to answer the quiz to get additional points.
translation.textSelesaikanChallenge: Complete the 1 Menit 1 Hari challenge every day for 21 days!
translation.textLearn: Learning material, please visit this link to learn.
translation.textLearnWeekly: Let’s have fun with AI game
translation.textLearnProgressWeekly: Tell us your experience with the Artificial Inteligence game.
translation.textQuizTitle: Let’s do below quiz to master your learning!
translation.textQuizTitleWeekly: Let’s do this quiz to upgrade your knowledge
translation.textTask2: Complete daily quiz (10 points for every right answer)
translation.textTask3: Learn the material and complete the quiz on the same day as the designated date
translation.textCongratulations: Congratulations! You have completed this challenge!
translation.textAnotherChallenge: Another challenge is waiting for you, let's do it now!
translation.textSampaiBertemu: See you on Cerdas Cermat Siapa Berani menembus batas.
translation.textDikerjakanhariYangSama: Learn the material and complete the quiz on the same day as the designated date
translation.textUnggahImage: Please upload your IG Story (your version of Anti Kudet) screenshot here
translation.textIdeTexarea: Write down your ideas for the application of AI technology in your daily work.
translation.textFinalChallengeLink: Please give your feedback in below link.
translation.textFinalChallengeAfterSubmit: Thank you for filling out the feedback form. Today is the last day of the 1 minute 1 day challenge. Thank you for your participation. Keep continuing the learning habit and see you at the next challenge. 'Salam Anti-Kudet!'
translation.textBehindTheChallengeDescGrowth:
As the business world changes rapidly, we need to continuously grow and adapt. Re-born from 1 Menit 1 Hari Challenge, we bring the gamification for you to start your Growth at PMI journey through Growth Quest.

Complete challenges across each stages and enjoy your growth journey!
translation.growthVisitLinkMateri: For learning material, please visit this link.
translation.textNoQuest: There is no Quest in this Stage.
translation.textCaraGrowthQuest: How to complete the Growth Quest ?
translation.textCaraGrowthQuestDesc1: Click the quest box that you will work on. Look at the instructions in the quest page and follow them accordingly.
translation.textCaraGrowthQuestDesc2: There are some quests that have additional points on the special quest page.
translation.textCaraGrowthQuestDesc3: Don't forget to check the growth quest page regularly to work on the next quest.
translation.textCaraGrowthQuestDesc4: Please ensure that each stage of the quest is completed in sequential order
translation.textCaraGrowthQuestDesc5: Stage 1 quest will be released every two days
translation.textCaraGrowthQuestDesc6: The number of quests completed will determine your growth meter in the Quest Completion Rate section.
translation.textCaraGrowthQuestDesc7: The total points collected from completing the quests can be seen on the Growth Meter at each stage.
translation.textTitleTiapQuest: Complete Your Growth Quest at Each Stage!
translation.textAnotherQuest: Another Quest is waiting for you, let's do it now!
translation.textCongratulationsQuest: Congratulations! You have completed this Quest!
translation.alertBeforeQuest:
Quest Locked
You must complete all Previous Quest before accessing this quest.
translation.clickDisiniLeaderboardStage2: Click Here for list of Top 112 Leaderboard for Stage 2
translation.textHowToCompleteNew1: Click the quest box that you will work on. Look at the instructions in the quest page and follow them accordingly.
translation.textHowToCompleteNew2: The quicker and more consistently you complete your quests, the more bonus points you can earn.
translation.textHowToCompleteNew3: During STAGE 2 - the quest drops daily! Don't forget to check the growth quest page everyday to work on the next quest.
translation.textHowToCompleteNew4: Every quest you finish powers up your Growth Meter. The more you complete, the higher your Quest Completion Rate climbs!
translation.textHowToCompleteNew5: Your total points are tracked on the Growth Meter at each stage. Aim high and see how far you can go!
translation.textHowToCompleteNew6: Active participants in Stage 2 will have the opportunity to receive a special invitation to the Sampoerna Olympics—your moment to shine on a bigger stage!
translation.textHowToCompleteNew7: Invite your friend to join Growth Quest through this form: http://bit.ly/43wKFgU
